title: serruria odorata
intro: Serruria odorata, also known as the King's Crag or King's Lillie, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant's extracts have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Serruria odorata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and ease respiratory issues.
